eligible_applicant_type: New York State health care providers and health care programs
eligibility_summary: New York State health care providers and health care programs that meet specific financial or operational challenges.

demographic_requirements: Must have all members of a coordinated school health team at the school building.
eligibility_summary: Public, charter, non-public schools, and BOCES with a coordinated school health team.

grant_title: Barns Restoration and Preservation Grant Program
eligible_applicant_type: Owners of agricultural structures (e.g., barns, sheds, silos, farm outbuildings)
demographic_requirements: Structure must be at least fifty years old and used for storage or shelter of livestock, farm equipment, or agricultural products.
eligibility_summary: Owners of qualifying agricultural structures in need of substantial repair.

eligibility_summary: Entities preserving and providing access to historically significant records.

grant_title: Publishing Historically Significant Records Relating to the History of the United States
eligibility_summary: Entities publishing historically significant U.S. records.

eligible_applicant_type: for-profit entities in partnership with qualified organizations
eligibility_summary: Developers and organizations creating affordable housing using Green Communities criteria.

grant_title: Read Across America Library Books Awards
eligible_applicant_type: Practicing pre K-12 teachers or education support professionals
demographic_requirements: At least 40% of students in the applicant's school must be eligible for free or reduced-price lunch.
eligibility_summary: NEA members in schools with economically disadvantaged student populations.

eligibility_summary: Non-profit K-12 schools integrating interactive technology into the curriculum.
